name: Checks Cashed A.C.E
description_short: ACE Cash Express operates 10+ Phoenix-area locations offering check cashing, title loans, money transfers, and prepaid card services with extended evening hours.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is a financial services company operating multiple locations across the Phoenix metropolitan area, including stores in Phoenix, Glendale, Tempe, Mesa, Peoria, and Chandler. The company has established itself as a convenience-focused alternative financial services provider serving communities that may lack access to traditional banking services.

The company offers a diverse range of financial products and services including check cashing, title loans (both standard and title registration installment loans ranging from $100-$2,500), money transfers, money orders, bill payment services, and ATM access. They also provide banking products through partnerships, including the Porte prepaid banking account and Flare Account (banking services provided by Pathward, N.A., Member FDIC), as well as the ACE Elite Visa prepaid debit card for account holders seeking mobile banking capabilities.

ACE Cash Express distinguishes itself through extended store hours (most locations open 9 AM-8 PM, some until 7 PM), multiple convenient locations within the Phoenix area, in-person customer support at physical locations, and a combination of traditional check-cashing services with newer financial products. The integration of FDIC-insured banking products through Pathward suggests an effort to bridge alternative finance and mainstream banking access.

As an alternative financial services provider, ACE Cash Express serves consumers seeking quick access to cash and financial services outside traditional banking hours and locations. However, title loans and similar products typically carry higher costs than conventional loans, and consumers should carefully evaluate terms and fees. The company's strength lies in accessibility and convenience rather than competitive pricing for credit products.
pros: Multiple Phoenix-area locations (10 stores listed) providing convenient access across Glendale, Tempe, Mesa, Peoria, and Chandler
Extended operating hours with most locations open 9 AM-8 PM daily, accommodating working customers
FDIC-insured banking products (Porte and Flare accounts) through Pathward partnership for safer money storage
Combination of basic financial services (check cashing, money orders, bill payment) and credit products in one location
In-person customer support available at all physical store locations for account questions
Title registration installment loans offer extended repayment periods compared to standard title loans
Mobile banking app access through Porte account for account management convenience
cons: Title loans and similar products typically carry significantly higher costs and interest rates than traditional personal loans or bank credit
Limited loan amounts ($100-$2,500 for title loans) may not address larger financial needs
Check cashing and money services inherently involve fees that reduce the amount received, though specific fee schedules are not disclosed on this page
Prepaid card products (ACE Elite, Porte, Flare) may carry monthly maintenance fees and transaction limits typical of non-bank accounts
As an alternative financial services provider, products are generally more expensive than equivalent services at traditional banks or credit unions
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers without access to traditional bank accounts or extended banking hours
Workers needing rapid check cashing services to access paycheck funds same-day
Consumers with vehicle titles/registrations seeking quick emergency cash loans
Individuals seeking prepaid banking solutions with in-person support and mobile banking capabilities
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers in the Phoenix area who lack traditional bank access or need rapid check cashing and emergency cash solutions outside standard banking hours. The primary caveat is that title loans and alternative financial products carry substantially higher costs than conventional credit—these should only be used for genuine emergencies, not routine borrowing, and terms should be carefully reviewed before committing.
services: Porte prepaid banking account (FDIC-insured through Pathward)
ACE Elite Visa prepaid debit card
